title: Chain Lightning
writer: Charles Alden Seltzer, Lambert Hillyer, Malcolm Stuart Boylan
actors: Buck Jones, Diane Ellis, Ted McNamara
plot: Steve Lannon is a retired gunman and reformed-outlaw who has left his ranch and is living in seclusion in San Francisco. He receives word that rustlers are on the rampage in the area of his ranch, and have stolen his horse, Silver...
